name: antigravity-library
description: Antigravity Agents Skills and Rules Library

scripts.graph:build: .venv\Scripts\python -X utf8 -c "from graphify.watch import _rebuild_code; from pathlib import Path; _rebuild_code(Path('.'))"
scripts.release: npm run validate && npm run catalog && node scripts/manage-tags.cjs
scripts.precommit: npm run validate && npm run catalog && git add README.md
scripts.prepare: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(!fs.existsSync('.git/hooks')) process.exit(0); const hook='.git/hooks/pre-commit'; fs.writeFileSync(hook, '#!/bin/sh\nnpm run precommit\n'); fs.chmodSync(hook, '755');"
